title: Everbound
description: A vanilla plus pack built around Create and Exploration.
body:
This pack stays close to vanilla while adding more to explore. Terralith and Tectonic alter the terrain, so every world feels new, and Dungeons and Taverns introduces all kinds of dungeons, towns, and landmarks to stumble upon.

For gameplay, you’ve got Create and its add-ons for machines and contraptions, along with Farmer’s Delight, which adds extra farming and cooking options.

Builders have plenty to work with too: Supplementaries and Handcrafted add numerous new blocks and decorations, while smaller mods like Visual Workbench, Chalk, and Traveler's Titles provide fun quality-of-life enhancements that you will notice as you play.

Performance is solid thanks to Sodium, C2ME, ModernFix, and other background tweaks, so you can run all this without the game turning into a slideshow.

Overall, this pack enhances Minecraft by offering bigger adventures, more building options, and improved performance, all while maintaining the original game's feel.
